CustomField.formula:
IF( Parent_Time_Period__r.Record_Type_Name__c = "Award Duration",Funding_Award__r.Funding_Award_Acronym__c + "-", Parent_Time_Period__r.Name +"-")
+
IF(ISPICKVAL(Baseline_Type__c, "Award") , "Award Baseline V"+TEXT(Baseline_Version_No__c), "Baseline V"+TEXT(Baseline_Version_No__c))
CustomField.label: Baseline Version
